description: Branch Snapshot Garbage Collection — Clean up deleted branch snapshots to prevent unbounded database growth

userStories.title: Add gc_branch_snapshots and get_git_branches functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GC functions to compare DB branches vs git branches and delete orphan snapshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Add get_git_branches helper using gix to discover local git branches
Returns list of deleted branch names

userStories.title: Call GC on serve startup
userStories.description: As the serve command, I need to run GC after DB is loaded so orphan snapshots are cleaned up before MCP server starts.
acceptanceCriteria: In run_serve in crates/seshat-cli/src/serve.rs, call gc_branch_snapshots after DB load
Log deleted branches at tracing::info level

userStories.title: Add periodic GC background task
userStories.description: As the serve command, I need to run GC every hour automatically to handle long-running sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tokio::spawn background task in run_serve that runs GC every 3600 seconds
Periodic GC uses same safety rules (never delete main/master/current branch)
Log deleted branches at tracing::info level

userStories.title: Add GC unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for GC to verify safety rules and orphan deletion work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test gc_deletes_orphan_branches — orphan branch is removed, main preserved
Test gc_preserves_current_branch — current branch not deleted even if missing from git
Test gc_preserves_main — main never deleted regardless of git state
Test gc_preserves_master — master never deleted regardless of git state
